title: Keep your details up to date
description: If you've made any changes to your details for your SMSF, then you'll need to let us know.
keywords: Notify changes, SMSF, self, managed, super fund, 28 days, fund, status

content_blocks.text: As a trustee of a self-managed super fund (SMSF) you must notify us of any changes to your SMSF .
No matter how minor they may seem, updates must be reported to us within 28 days .

items: contact details (contact person, phone or email address)
change of structure within your SMSF

content_blocks.text: Keeping your information current is essential. If your contact details are out of date, you could miss important correspondence and time-sensitive notifications from us.

To help protect your fund, we'll send an alert via SMS, email or both whenever changes are made. These alerts are designed to safeguard your SMSF against potential fraud or misconduct. Please note our SMS alerts do not contain hyperlinks.
For more information visit changes to your SMSF on our website.
Stay up to date by visiting our SMSF newsroom and subscribing External Link to our monthly newsletter.

content_text:
As a trustee of a self-managed super fund (SMSF) you must notify us of any changes to your SMSF .
No matter how minor they may seem, updates must be reported to us within 28 days .
These changes could include:
- contact details (contact person, phone or email address)
- change of structure within your SMSF
- change in fund status
- bank account details.
Keeping your information current is essential. If your contact details are out of date, you could miss important correspondence and time-sensitive notifications from us.
To help protect your fund, we'll send an alert via SMS, email or both whenever changes are made. These alerts are designed to safeguard your SMSF against potential fraud or misconduct. Please note our SMS alerts do not contain hyperlinks.
For more information visit changes to your SMSF on our website.
Stay up to date by visiting our SMSF newsroom and subscribing External Link to our monthly newsletter.
